MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave To File Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar May-03-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendant Pacific Gas and Electric Company's motion for leave to file a cross-complaint is granted. The addition of Annuzzi's Concrete Services, Inc. as a cross-defendant serves judicial economy and is in keeping with the policy of liberally permitting amendments to pleadings. Plaintiff Giovanni Torre's concerns that the granting of this motion will result impose burdensome additional discovery on him and will substantially delay the trial are, at this point, speculative and are insufficient grounds to deny the motion. If Mr. Torre believes that any additional discovery requests served on him are unduly burdensome, he can seek a protective order. If Mr. Torre believes that any request for a trial continuance is unfair to him, he can oppose the request and/or ask that the PG&E's cross-complaint be severed. There is no reason at this point to believe that these courses of action will not mitigate or eliminate his discovery and trial date concerns. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
